arts.sum: Brighton & Hove Albion’s Casper Nilsson has told Fotbollskanalen that he’s unsure of his future at The Amex beyond this season. The 21-year-old left Malmö FF to join Brighton’s academy in 2020 and has represented the Seagulls at U18 and U21 level.
